title: mobius-integer: Dual-strand integer — machine i64 + exact BigInt. The Ariane 5 would have landed.
description: A dual-strand integer type that carries both machine i64 (fast, wrapping) and exact BigInt (never overflows) simultaneously. Catches the class of integer overflow bugs that destroyed the Ariane 5 rocket ($370M), broke YouTube's view counter, and triggered Boeing 787 emergency reboots.
notes: Part of the Möbius family — strand-native types that eliminate computational redundancy caused by representational imprecision.
